creator: melifaro@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Konrad from comment #19)
Great news!

Re testing Marko’s changes - I’d love to see the results as well.
Currently some dxr rebuilds take up to 800ms and I’d really love to see the new numbers. With the current framework logic, 800ms may be a bit long. depending on the testing results I may need to change some of the logic to handle such scenarious better.
